message:
Add bool() and string methods to native codegen

Agent 1: Wire up bool() and string methods routing
- Add bool() to built-in functions dispatch in main.zig
- Add upper/lower/strip/replace routing to methods module

Agent 2: Implement bool() in builtins.zig
- Simple != 0 check for numeric values
- TODO for full Python truthiness (empty strings/lists/dicts)

Agent 3: Implement 4 string methods in methods.zig
- genStrip() FULLY implemented using std.mem.trim
- genUpper/Lower/Replace placeholders for future work

Build passes: make build ✅
